flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at Traviss Technical College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (82.6% vs 88.7%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Traviss Technical College rose 807% between 2021 and 2024 (9.9% → 89.5%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Traviss Technical College rose 82% between 2021 and 2024 (253 → 460).
